race.name: König Ludwig Lauf
race.tagline: Fifty kilometers through the Bavarian Alps — where Germany's fairy-tale king once roamed, now skiers chase glory beneath the Passion Play village.

vitals.aid_stations: 5 stations with warm drinks, energy food, and wax service

climate.description: Early February in the Bavarian Alps brings cold, snowy conditions at 850m elevation. The Ammergau Alps provide a reliable snow pocket, though climate change has introduced variability. Clear days offer stunning mountain views; snowfall during the race is common.
challenges: Alpine weather can shift rapidly — snowfall, fog, or sunshine within hours
Elevation changes create micro-climate wax challenges
Occasional warm Föhn winds can soften snow dramatically
Cold valley inversions possible in early morning

course.primary: Rolling course through the Ammergau Alps foothills around Oberammergau. The route weaves through Alpine meadows, forest trails, and valley floors beneath dramatic mountain scenery. Moderate elevation gain with some challenging climbs and rewarding descents.
course.surface: Machine-groomed trails through Alpine meadows and forest
course.grooming: Excellent German standards — well-maintained double tracks with skating lane
features: Start/finish in Oberammergau, home of the famous Passion Play
Named after Bavaria's 'fairy-tale king' Ludwig II
Route passes through traditional Bavarian villages

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Outstanding Alpine scenery and solid Bavarian organization. Good accessibility from Munich. Snow reliability has become more variable with climate change at this altitude. Strong community atmosphere in the culturally rich Oberammergau setting.
nordic_lab_rating.tier_note: Prestige 4 promotes one tier: raw T2 (70) stays TIER 2 (already T2)

history.summary: König Ludwig Lauf was founded in 1968 in Oberammergau, the Bavarian village famous for its Passion Play tradition dating to 1634. Named after King Ludwig II of Bavaria — the eccentric 'fairy-tale king' who built Neuschwanstein Castle — the race has grown into Germany's premier marathon cross-country ski event and a key fixture on the Worldloppet circuit. The Ammergau Alps region has a deep skiing heritage, and the race draws heavily from Germany's large recreational skiing community.
notable_facts: Named after King Ludwig II, Bavaria's legendary castle-building monarch
Oberammergau is famous for its Passion Play, performed every 10 years since 1634
Germany's largest marathon cross-country ski race
Worldloppet member since the series' early years
The nearby Ettal Monastery provides a dramatic cultural backdrop
Ludwig II was an avid outdoorsman who built Alpine retreats throughout the region

videos.title: 2023.02.04 König Ludwig Lauf 2023 - FT 43 km - Olga Kasatkina
videos.description:
EN
König Ludwig Lauf is the largest ski marathon in Germany, was founded in 1968 and is held in Oberammergau and Ettal in the Ammergau Alps Nature Park. It is part of the Worldloppet series and annually gathers cross-country skiers from more than 30 countries.

Excellent organization, interesting track, difficult weather conditions and perfect result guarantee memories for a long time.

RU
König Ludwig Lauf - крупнейший лыжный марафон в Германии, основанный в 1968 году и проходящий в Обераммергау и Эттале в Ammergau Alps Nature Park. Он входит в серию Worldloppet и ежегодно собирает любителей лыжных гонок из более чем 30 стран.

Отличная организация, интересная трасса, сложные погодные условия и отличный результат гарантируют воспоминания на долгое время.

#koenigludwiglauf #crosscountryskiing #xcskiing #winter #ammergaueralpen #skiing #activelife

videos.title: Konig Ludwig Lauf 2011
videos.description: Ski the Konig Ludwig Lauf cross-country ski race with Saul Goldman. This is a citizen racers perspective of this World Loppet race. It is held annually in Oberamergau, Germany. Oberamergau, Germany is famous for its Passion Play, held once every ten years. It is less famous for the annual Konig Ludwig Lauf ski race, named after the Bavarian King Ludwig II. He commissioned the construction of several extravagant fantasy castles and palaces.Since his legacy of grandiose castles lives on in the form of massive tourist revenue, King Ludwig is generally well liked and even revered by many in Bavaria today.
tags: Cross counry ski race world Loppet
videos.curation_reason: Citizen racer's POV perspective of the World Loppet race showing detailed course experience.

videos.title: Show Case Cross Country Skiing: König Ludwig Lauf Germany
🎥  Vlog Gunnar's Nordic Adventures at König Ludwig Lauf 2022 ( with paragliding🪂)
videos.description:
🎥 Vlog coming in 3,2,1...🎥
Gunnar's Nordic Adventures, this time from Oberammergau 🇩🇪 , the home of the royal König Ludwig Lauf 👑 !
The 2022 edition of the german Worldloppet race was an adventure for itself, as it was finally celebrating a comeback to the tracks after 2 years break. Only happy faces to see among the thousands of starters, but see by yourself.
💥 But of course, we want to experience the venues of Worldloppet also from another perspective, so for this Vlog Gunnar took off into the sky, to experience Oberammergau and the tracks of KLL from above during a paragliding flight 🪂. Btw: Northug Glasses also perform high in the sky 🤙
🤝 Special thanks go to:
👑 König Ludwig Lauf for hosting us
🪂 fly-garmisch.com Gleitschirm Paragliding
🕶 Petter Northug for supporting us with great glasses & clothing See less
